alcoholContent.note: A19: real TTB ABV tolerance tables not implemented in prototype

confidence.note: threshold is the split between confident and uncertain used by P1-5 triage. legibilityFactors multiply the base confidence per the model's per-region legibility flag. The model's overall self-reported confidence is NEVER used here (D5).

warningLegibilityReread.note: P3-2: the extraction service triggers a targeted high-res re-read of the warning region when the model's per-face legibility flag matches this value. The prototype model only emits 'good' | 'low', so the threshold is structural rather than numeric — when the flag space gets richer (per-region float scores), this turns into a real threshold.
